section.title: Section title
section.p: A paragraph with bold and italic text.
The <xref> tag is used for source-to-source links, like , and external links. An external link, Eclipse, has to specify the format and scope.
section.pre: A preformatted paragraph is represented by the <pre> tag.
section.p: The following source code block contains a Ruby function named hello that prints Hello, World!.
